channel.title: Projects on Vighnesh Nilajakar
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Vighnesh Nilajakar

item.title: Grocery Shop Management System
item.author: vighneshnilajakar2@gmail.com (Vighnesh Nilajakar)
item.description: Introduction Grocery Shop Management System is a Software made to ease the management of a Grocery Shop and assists in keeping logs of Products, Customers, Inventory, and Bills.
item.dc:creator: Vighnesh Nilajakar

item.title: SUPER STEVE
item.author: vighneshnilajakar2@gmail.com (Vighnesh Nilajakar)
item.description: Introduction Super Steve is a Minecraft Parody, which I made after watching the CS50 Lecture.
item.dc:creator: Vighnesh Nilajakar
